name: Upcoming Media
overview: Display upcoming movies and shows on your Jellyfin home page. Admins can search TMDb, set release dates, and add 'Coming Soon' labels.
description:
A Jellyfin plugin that lets server admins curate a list of upcoming movies and TV shows. Features include:

- Search and fetch metadata from TMDb (The Movie Database)
- Set custom available dates and 'Coming Soon' messages
- Automatic status transitions (Coming Soon → Available → Expired)
- Home page widget showing upcoming content to all users
- Scheduled task for automated status updates

versions.changelog: Initial release with TMDb search, home widget, file swap system, and scheduled tasks.
